DP.108.0000:
Hello, hello!
How, I say, do you do?\f
I am the Pokémon Fan Club Chairman!
Indeed, yes I am!\f
When you wish to treat your Pokémon
to a treat, what, I say, do you do?\f
If I may say so, and I will, I feed
Poffins to my Pokémon!\f
And why, I say, would I do that?\f
Because the giving of Poffins is
a way of expressing your love!\f
For example! If I were to give a
Sweet Poffin, the Pokémon eating it\r
would become more cute!\f
For example! A Spicy Poffin will add
to the coolness of a Pokémon!\f
In such ways I say that Poffins have
nothing but goodness for Pokémon!\f
Therefore!\f
I declare this Poffin Case to be
a gift from me to you!\f
DP.108.0001:
I urge you to fill it with Poffins
and be generous in dispensing them\r
to your Pokémon!
DP.108.0002:
Nationwide, there are other fan
clubs, but we are number one!\f
And why are we number one?
Because I brag more than anyone!\f
But now I can’t brag as much...\f
People started complaining, so
I’ve had to curtail my bragging...
DP.108.0003:
Welcome to the Pokémon Fan Club!
Oh, your [0100,0000]...\f
DP.108.0004:
It simply adores you!
Why, I feel like I’m intruding!
DP.108.0005:
It’s very friendly toward you.
I can tell you treat it kindly.
DP.108.0006:
It’s quite friendly to you.
It must be happy being with you.
DP.108.0007:
It’s warming up to you.
That’s my impression.
DP.108.0008:
It’s feeling neutral toward you.
It’s up to you to change that.
DP.108.0009:
Hmm...
It seems to dislike you a little.
DP.108.0010:
Oh, my... I think this one really
hasn’t taken too kindly to you.
